title: responsive-orchestrator data contracts
description: Wire formats and stored entities introduced or modified by responsive-orchestrator.

JobId.description: Stable identifier issued by task tool at dispatch. Same value flows through dispatched stub, completion event, pending notice, and cancel_task input.

ChildSessionID.description: Subagent session ID, allocated at dispatch.

TerminalFinish.description: Extended TERMINAL_FINISHES set. New entries: rate_limited (DD-7), quota_low (DD-4).

NoticeStatus.description: User-facing classification for pending notices. Distinct from raw runloop finish.

TaskDispatchedResult.description: Stub tool_result returned synchronously by task tool, satisfying LLM tool-use protocol (DD-1).

note.description: Hint to remind LLM that result will arrive later as a pending notice on the next turn.

PendingSubagentNotice.description: Wake-only notice appended to parent session info.json#pendingSubagentNotices when a subagent reaches terminal state. Rendered as a one-line system-prompt addendum on the next prompt assemble, then removed from the array (DD-3). Never appended to messages/.

elapsedMs.description: Wall-clock time from dispatch to terminal.

at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the notice was appended.

errorDetail.description: Present for rate_limited / error / silent_kill statuses.

rotateHint.description: Present when status=quota_low (DD-3.1). Tells main agent the exhausted account and instructs rotation before next dispatch.

exhaustedAccountId.description: Concatenated provider:accountId of the account subagent was using when it exited.

directive.description: Instruction to main agent. Only one value defined currently.

cancelReason.description: Present when status=cancelled — echoes cancel_task's reason field for audit.

ParentSessionInfoExtension.description: Optional fields added to session info.json. Backward-compatible.

pendingSubagentNotices.description: FIFO queue of unprocessed notices. Populated by task-result subscriber, drained by prompt-assemble. Empty/absent when nothing pending.

TaskCompletedEvent.description: Internal Bus event emitted by task tool's background watcher when subagent terminates. Subscriber translates this into a PendingSubagentNotice.

CancelTaskInput.description: Input schema for the cancel_task tool exposed to main agent.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason. Echoed as cancelReason on the resulting PendingSubagentNotice.

status.description: cancelled: signal sent. not_found: jobId unknown. already_terminal: subagent already finished before signal arrived.

SystemPromptAddendumFormat.description: Logical shape of how prompt-assemble renders one PendingSubagentNotice into a one-line system-prompt addendum. Wire format is plain text inside the system message, not JSON; this schema documents what the renderer reads from each notice.

template.description: Per-status text template, parameterized with notice fields. Concrete templates live in design.md DD-3 and DD-3.1; data-schema.json only declares the dependency.

SubagentRunloopState.description: Runtime state added to processor.ts for subagent quota-low awareness.

quotaLowExitRequested.description: Set by post-turn check (DD-4) when remaining quota ≤ red-line. Next iteration triggers wrap-up flow instead of new LLM call.

quotaSnapshotPercent.description: Last observed remaining percent for diagnostics and rotateHint payload.

ListSubagentsInput.description: Input for system-manager.list_subagents (DD-11). Omit parentSessionID for global query.

includeFinished.description: When false, only running subagents are returned.

ReadSubsessionResult.description: Either a successful read or a structured error. Errors do NOT throw.
